meaning: n.[植](根深达地下潜水层的) 地下水湿生植物
examples: For forest, grassland and river ecosystems, phreatophyte should be applied to, promoting the primary succession of the ecosystem.
The population of Sabina vulgaris are mainly typical mesophyte, secondly the xerophytes, super- xerophytes; the proportion of Phreatophyte is very small.
